papers.summary_zh: 多机器人任务分配（MRTA）是去中心化多智能体系统中的一个核心挑战，其中机器人团队必须在有限的通信下协作分配和执行任务，同时优化全局性能目标。拍卖共识算法，例如基于共识的捆绑算法（CBBA），提供可扩展的去中心化协调和可证明的收敛性，但依赖于手工制作的贪婪评分函数，这通常会导致任务分配不理想。本文提出了一种学习增强的拍卖共识框架，其中 CBBA 的确定性投标机制被使用强化学习训练的神经投标策略所取代。在集中训练和去中心化执行范式下，代理学习根据部分本地观察来计算任务出价，同时保留用于去中心化协调的标准拍卖和共识阶段。学习到的投标策略是使用邻近策略优化进行训练的，其奖励是通过接近通过混合整数线性规划获得的全局最优解决方案而形成的。评估了多种神经架构，包括神经加法模型、长短期记忆 (LSTM) 模型和 Set Transformer 模型。不同群体规模的实验结果表明，学习的投标策略可以比传统的 CBBA 提高解决方案质量，同时保持去中心化执行。所提出的方法强调了将强化学习与经典分布式协调算法相结合的有效性，为实现更高质量的去中心化多机器人任务分配提供了可扩展的途径。

papers.title: Higher Order Reasoning for Collaborative Communicationless Mobile Robot Operations
papers.summary: In communicationless environments, multi-robot systems must operate without the constant information exchange that many coordination strategies typically assume. This paper presents a novel dynamic epistemic planning framework that enables implicit coordination and long horizon planning through higher-order reasoning among robots. With our approach, robots form and propagate higher-order belief particles, update world beliefs using Bayesian inference, and select actions via a behavior tree that anticipates teammates' likely decisions. A temporally aware Model Predictive Path Integral (MPPI) controller integrates this reasoning into low-level execution, allowing robots to plan intercepts and adapt trajectories under partial observability. The proposed framework is evaluated in both simulations and physical experiments, where it consistently reduces task completion time compared to a first-order baseline, demonstrating that epistemic logic can serve as a robust foundation for resilient coordination in communication-restricted domains.
papers.title_zh: 协作无通信移动机器人操作的高阶推理
papers.summary_zh: 在无通信环境中，多机器人系统必须在没有许多协调策略通常假设的持续信息交换的情况下运行。本文提出了一种新颖的动态认知规划框架，该框架通过机器人之间的高阶推理实现隐式协调和长期规划。通过我们的方法，机器人形成并传播高阶信念粒子，使用贝叶斯推理更新世界信念，并通过预测队友可能决策的行为树选择行动。时间感知模型预测路径积分 (MPPI) 控制器将此推理集成到低级执行中，允许机器人在部分可观测性下规划拦截并调整轨迹。所提出的框架在模拟和物理实验中进行了评估，与一阶基线相比，它持续减少了任务完成时间，证明认知逻辑可以作为通信受限领域中弹性协调的坚实基础。

papers.title: OCELOT: Odometry and Contact Estimation for Legged Robots
papers.summary: One of the significant challenges in legged robotics is achieving accurate odometry using only onboard proprioceptive sensors. In this study, we present a complete leg odometry pipeline based on an Error-State EKF (ESEKF) that relies exclusively on proprioceptive data: a body fixed IMU, joint encoders, and force sensors, where filter's state is corrected by feet determined to be in a stationary stance. The core of our contribution is fused contact detection and an uncertainty quantification module designed to explicitly identify and reject slippage. This module runs two detectors in parallel for each foot, 1) a debounced, force-based Gaussian Mixture Model (GMM) guided Finite State Machine (FSM) to confirm physical contact, and 2) a kinematic-based Generalized Likelihood Ratio Test (GLRT) on the estimated velocity of the foot. The continuous quality scores from both estimators are fused to detect if the foot is both physically loaded and kinematically stationary and served as an uncertainty signal for each contact. To validate our approach, we collected a multi-modal dataset of 29 sequences spanning diverse indoor and outdoor terrains (e.g., concrete, grass, pebble, and rock) total of 2.4 km long. We benchmarked our approach against both proprioceptive and exteroceptive methods. The results demonstrate our method's efficacy in providing accurate odometry estimates, robustly handling slippage-prone environments. We also share our code and real-time ROS2 package as open-source.
papers.title_zh: OCELOT：腿式机器人的里程计和接触估计
papers.summary_zh: 腿式机器人面临的重大挑战之一是仅使用机载本体感受传感器实现准确的里程测量。在这项研究中，我们提出了一个基于错误状态 EKF (ESEKF) 的完整腿部里程计管道，该管道完全依赖于本体感觉数据：身体固定 IMU、关节编码器和力传感器，其中过滤器的状态通过确定处于静止姿势的脚进行校正。我们贡献的核心是融合接触检测和不确定性量化模块，旨在明确识别和拒绝滑动。该模块为每只脚并行运行两个检测器，1) 一个基于力的去抖高斯混合模型 (GMM) 引导的有限状态机 (FSM) 来确认物理接触，2) 对脚的估计速度进行基于运动学的广义似然比测试 (GLRT)。来自两个估计器的连续质量分数被融合，以检测脚是否同时受到物理负载和运动学静止，并作为每次接触的不确定性信号。为了验证我们的方法，我们收集了包含 29 个序列的多模态数据集，涵盖不同的室内和室外地形（例如混凝土、草地、卵石和岩石），总长 2.4 公里。我们将我们的方法与本体感受和外感受方法进行了基准测试。结果证明了我们的方法在提供准确的里程计估计、稳健地处理容易打滑的环境方面的有效性。我们还以开源方式分享我们的代码和实时 ROS2 包。

papers.title: EvoScene-VLA: Evolving Scene Beliefs Inside the Action Decoder for Chunked Robot Control
papers.summary: Chunked vision-language-action (VLA) policies predict multi-step robot controls, conditioning each update on the current visual observation alone. Yet robot actions cause contact, occlusion, and object motion, and the geometry that later decisions depend on can change before the next visual update arrives. Spatial VLAs improve current-frame geometry. Temporal VLAs aggregate past frames. Neither maintains an action-updated scene prior across chunks. We argue for a persistent action-updated scene state across control calls, and introduce EvoScene-VLA. Its recurrent scene prefix carries a geometry-aware scene state across chunks. At each vision-language model (VLM) call, the VLM combines scene information from the current observation with the action-updated prior from the previous chunk; the action decoder outputs both the next action chunk and a compact scene update. This update becomes the next prior, which the VLM corrects against the new observation when the next call arrives. Each control call therefore starts from a scene prior that reflects both recent actions and fresh visual evidence. During training, \textbf{Scene Predictor} supplies future scene-token targets, and Geometric Anchor aligns scene slots with frozen depth and 3D teachers. We discard both modules at deployment. On 31 RoboTwin tasks, EvoScene-VLA raises average success from 87.2% to 89.1% in fixed evaluation and from 86.1% to 88.5% in randomized evaluation. On the Galaxea R1-Lite real robot, EvoScene-VLA outperforms all baselines.
papers.title_zh: EvoScene-VLA：用于分块机器人控制的动作解码器内部不断演变的场景信念
papers.summary_zh: 分块视觉-语言-动作（VLA）策略预测多步机器人控制，仅根据当前视觉观察调节每次更新。然而，机器人的动作会导致接触、遮挡和物体运动，并且后续决策所依赖的几何形状可能会在下一次视觉更新到来之前发生变化。空间 VLA 改进了当前帧的几何形状。时间 VLA 聚合过去的帧。两者都没有跨块维护动作更新的场景。我们主张跨控制调用持久的动作更新场景状态，并引入 EvoScene-VLA。它的循环场景前缀携带跨块的几何感知场景状态。在每次视觉语言模型 (VLM) 调用时，VLM 将当前观察到的场景信息与前一个块中更新的动作结合起来；动作解码器输出下一个动作块和紧凑的场景更新。此更新成为下一个更新，当下一个呼叫到达时，VLM 将根据新的观察结果进行纠正。因此，每个控制调用都从反映最近动作和新视觉证据的先前场景开始。在训练期间，\textbf{场景预测器} 提供未来的场景标记目标，几何锚点将场景槽与冻结深度和 3D 教师对齐。我们在部署时丢弃这两个模块。在 31 项 RoboTwin 任务中，EvoScene-VLA 将固定评估的平均成功率从 87.2% 提高到 89.1%，将随机评估的平均成功率从 86.1% 提高到 88.5%。在 Galaxea R1-Lite 真实机器人上，EvoScene-VLA 的性能优于所有基线。

papers.title: Analytical and Experimental Force Analysis of a Soft Linear Pneumatic Actuator
papers.summary: Soft sleeve actuators (SSAs) have recently been developed as a pneumatic actuation approach for wearable and assistive robotic systems. By integrating the actuation structure into a sleeve-like geometry, these actuators can reduce reliance on external attachment layers and transmission mechanisms while maintaining compliance with limb-shaped surfaces. However, the force-generation behavior of SSAs remains insufficiently explained, particularly with respect to the variation of output force during extension, the influence of external loading, and the mechanical role of axial stiffness. This paper presents an analytical and experimental force analysis of a linear soft sleeve actuator (LSSA). A quasi-static analytical model was developed by expressing the net axial force as the pressure-generated contribution from the cap and folded walls, reduced by the force associated with axial stiffness. The model incorporates internal pressure, projected pressure areas, folded wall geometry, axial displacement, and an experimentally fitted axial stiffness relation. Prescribed-extension and static-load experiments were conducted to evaluate the actuator response. At 125 kPa, the generated force decreased from approximately 112 N at zero extension to nearly zero at 40 mm. Static loading delayed measurable force generation and reduced force output, particularly at low and intermediate pressures. The results show that LSSA force generation is governed by coupled effects of pressure, geometry, displacement, loading, and axial stiffness.
papers.title_zh: 软线性气动执行器的解析和实验力分析
papers.summary_zh: 软套筒致动器（SSA）最近被开发为可穿戴和辅助机器人系统的气动致动方法。通过将致动结构集成到套筒状几何结构中，这些致动器可以减少对外部附着层和传输机制的依赖，同时保持与肢体形状表面的顺应性。然而，SSA 的力产生行为仍然没有得到充分的解释，特别是在拉伸过程中输出力的变化、外部载荷的影响以及轴向刚度的机械作用方面。本文介绍了线性软套筒执行器 (LSSA) 的分析和实验力分析。通过将净轴向力表示为盖和折叠壁产生的压力贡献，并通过与轴向刚度相关的力减少，开发了准静态分析模型。该模型包含内部压力、投影压力区域、折叠壁几何形状、轴向位移和实验拟合的轴向刚度关系。进行规定的延伸和静态负载实验来评估执行器响应。在 125 kPa 时，产生的力从零延伸时的约 112 N 减少到 40 mm 时几乎为零。静态负载延迟了可测量的力的产生并减少了力的输出，特别是在低压和中压下。结果表明，LSSA 力的产生受压力、几何形状、位移、载荷和轴向刚度的耦合影响。
